settings.pageSubtitle: Manage your account and CRM settings

notifications.cardDescription: Choose how you want to be informed about new leads, due tasks, and important changes.
notifications.pushHelp: Instant alerts for new leads, reminders, and status changes in the browser.
notifications.emailHelp: Important updates and CRM notifications (e.g. reminders, comments) to your account email. Requires a saved SMTP configuration in the section below. Sending uses the triggering user’s SMTP if configured; otherwise the first administrator’s stored SMTP settings.
notifications.activeChannels: {count, plural, =0 {No notification channels active} one {One channel active} other {# channels active}}
notifications.adminGlobalFeedHelp: When enabled, your notification feed will include copies of all in-app notifications sent to any CRM user — for activity oversight. Additional emails to you only if “Email notifications” is on and SMTP is configured. Default: off.

trashBin.cardDescription: When enabled, deleted CRM records go to the trash first (admins can restore them from Profile).
trashBin.label: Enable trash bin
trashBin.help: When disabled, deletes remove records immediately.

aiEnrichment.cardDescription: Structuring model, optional web search (Perplexity) in the company dialog, daily cap, and address focus.
aiEnrichment.vercelAiCreditsUnavailable: Vercel AI Gateway credits could not be loaded.
aiEnrichment.vercelAiCreditsNotConfigured: Set AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY to display gateway credits.
aiEnrichment.grokBillingNotice: Grok usage is billed to your xAI account. Check your balance at
aiEnrichment.toggleEnabledHelp: When disabled, enrichment actions in the CRM are unavailable.
aiEnrichment.dailyLimitHelp: Maximum AI enrichment runs per calendar day (UTC) and user.
aiEnrichment.researchModeHelpAuto: Try your primary model first. If you pick a backup, the CRM switches only when the gateway reports a short-lived issue.
aiEnrichment.researchModeHelpPrimaryOnly: Every run uses your primary model only — no automatic backup.
aiEnrichment.researchModeHelpSpecific: Pick one gateway model for every run (any provider in the list).
aiEnrichment.researchModeHelpGrok: Uses your Grok pool (primary + backup). Billed on your xAI account when AI_ENRICHMENT_XAI_API_KEY is set.
aiEnrichment.gatewayPrimaryHelp: Model for phase 2 (JSON from research). Tried first in Automatic mode; backup only on short-lived gateway issues.
aiEnrichment.gatewayReserveHelp: Optional. Choose “None” to disable automatic fallback. Otherwise pick a different model than the primary.
aiEnrichment.structuringModelHelp: Responsible for the final quality of suggestions – in all modes.
aiEnrichment.webSearchConfigHelp: Applies when “Use current web search” is on in the company dialog. Search language follows your CRM UI language.
aiEnrichment.addressFocusHelp: Research emphasizes street, postal code, city, region, country, water distance, and water type when publicly verifiable.
aiEnrichment.toastInvalid: Invalid input — please check the limit and fields.

semanticSearch.cardDescription: Configure embedding provider/model and control semantic ranking + backfill behavior.
semanticSearch.providerModelChangeHelp: Changes take effect on the next search or when creating/updating companies.
semanticSearch.semanticSearchEnabledHelp: When disabled, company search uses lexical matching only.
semanticSearch.autoBackfillHelp: When enabled, new or updated companies get embeddings in the background.
semanticSearch.showBadgeLabel: Show AI semantic badge in search input
semanticSearch.showBadgeHelp: Controls visibility of the Sparkles AI badge in the companies search field.
semanticSearch.savedToastDescription: Your changes are active for the next search and upcoming company updates.
semanticSearch.saveErrorTitle: Could not save semantic search settings

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Set interface language, time zone, and accent colors for the whole CRM. Switch light or dark mode from the header.

map.title: OpenMap — map provider
map.descriptionRich: Default: OpenStreetMap (CARTO) — same as before (tiles, attribution, behaviour). Google and Apple are optional.
map.googleKeyHelp: Only for the Google basemap. Enable Map Tiles API and billing in your Google Cloud project.
map.appleTokenHelp: Optional for future MapKit. Until then: same OSM/CARTO basemap as the default.

openMap.title: OpenMap settings
openMap.autoLoadLabel: Automatically load OSM POIs at zoom ≥ 13
openMap.autoLoadHelp: When off, POIs are not fetched as you pan or zoom.
openMap.cacheValidityLabel: How long the map remembers loaded areas
openMap.cacheValidityWhat: When you view a place on the map, AquaDock remembers that points of interest there are already loaded. This setting is how long that memory lasts before the map checks again for updates.
openMap.cacheValidityTradeoff: Shorter times give you newer listings when businesses open or close, but the map may reload a bit more as you pan around. Longer times feel faster if you work in the same harbours or regions most days.
openMap.cacheValidityRecommend: If you usually work in the same areas, a longer time is comfortable. If you often explore new regions and want the freshest possible listings, pick a shorter time—or clear the POI cache after big changes.
openMap.maxPoisLabel: Maximum POIs to keep in memory
openMap.maxPoisHelp: Older POIs outside the current view may be dropped when this limit is exceeded.
openMap.aggressiveCachingHelp: Treat nearby areas as already loaded sooner (larger coverage padding). Fewer requests; slightly staler data at the edges.
openMap.confirmClear: Clear the POI cache and reload the page to apply changes?

brevo.title: Brevo
brevo.introRich: Sender for Brevo campaigns. Leave empty to use <name/> / <email/> from the environment.
brevo.footerRich: Campaigns at <campaign>/brevo</campaign>, contact sync at <sync>/brevo/sync</sync>. API key: environment variable <key>BREVO_API_KEY</key> in <env>.env.local</env> (v3 key, usually <prefix>xkeysib-</prefix>).

userManagement.createDialogDescription: Create a new user account. A password reset email will be sent to the user.
userManagement.editDisplayNameDescription: Update the display name for this user.
userManagement.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this user? This action cannot be undone.
userManagement.toastResetEmailRateLimited: For security, reset emails can only be requested again after a short wait.

smtp.cardDescription: Send email via your SMTP server; credentials are stored per user. This configuration is also used for CRM email notifications and test messages. Delivery prefers the triggering user’s SMTP if saved; otherwise an administrator’s stored SMTP configuration.
smtp.toastConfigLoadedDescLoaded: The settings were loaded successfully from the database.
smtp.toastConfigLoadedDescEmpty: No saved configuration found. Fields are empty.
smtp.toastLoadFailedDefaultDesc: Unknown error while loading the configuration
smtp.toastTestEmailRequired: Please enter a test email address

companies.title: Companies
companies.subtitle: Leads, partners & friends
companies.bulkDeleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete these {count} companies? This cannot be undone.
companies.toastTrashedCompany: This company was moved to the trash.
companies.notificationNewOwnerTitle: You are now listed as responsible for {companyName}
companies.notificationNewOwnerBody: Open the company record for details.
companies.syncContactsOwnerHint: All contacts for this company will get the same responsible person.
companies.tableSearchPlaceholder: Search companies by meaning — name, notes, address…
companies.tableSemanticSearchTooltip: Semantic search powered by xAI — understands meaning, not just keywords.
companies.tableSearchModeTooltipHybrid: Hybrid ranking: embeddings plus full-text (matches how results are ordered).
companies.tableSearchModeTooltipKeywordDisabled: Text match only — semantic search is turned off in Settings.
companies.tableSearchModeTooltipKeywordFallback: Text match only — hybrid ranking was unavailable (check embedding keys or try again).
companies.tableDeleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this company? This cannot be undone.
companies.detailMissingCoordinatesTooltip: Latitude and longitude are missing. Please add the coordinates first.
companies.geocodeDetailIncompleteAddressTooltip: Geocoding needs at least a city plus street or postal code.
companies.geocodeBulkTooltipNone: None of the selected entries need geocoding.

aiEnrich.modalDescription: Review suggestions; nothing saves automatically. See Settings for details.
aiEnrich.disclaimer: Data comes from the public web. Please verify each suggestion before applying it to the CRM.
aiEnrich.applyToast: Selected suggestions were merged into the form.
aiEnrich.applyNone: Please select at least one field.
aiEnrich.errorDisabled: AI enrichment is disabled for your account.
aiEnrich.errorRateLimit: Daily AI enrichment limit reached. Try again tomorrow or adjust the limit in settings.
aiEnrich.errorDailyLimitDetail: Your daily AI limit has been reached ({used}/{limit}).{hint}
aiEnrich.errorVercelGatewayCredits: No AI credits are available on Vercel AI Gateway. Please check your balance.
aiEnrich.errorXaiGrokQuota: Your xAI Grok quota is exhausted. Please check your xAI account.
aiEnrich.errorGatewayRateLimit: The AI gateway reported a temporary rate limit. Please wait a moment and try again.
aiEnrich.errorGatewayNetwork: The AI gateway could not be reached. Check your connection and try again.
aiEnrich.errorEnrichmentNoOutput: The model returned no usable output. Please retry; if it keeps failing, check the model or input data.
aiEnrich.errorDisabledSettingsHint: Enable it under Settings → AI enrichment.
aiEnrich.grokToggleHint: Uses xAI Grok explicitly via AI Gateway (BYOK: AI_ENRICHMENT_XAI_API_KEY). Otherwise Claude first, with Grok as fallback when needed.
aiEnrich.sessionModelHint: Does not change your saved settings — only this enrichment run.
aiEnrich.webSearchCurrentHint: Off: model knowledge only. On: web search using your Perplexity settings.
aiEnrich.webSearchActive: Web search on — structuring uses your saved models.
aiEnrich.modelOnlyStatusLine: Model knowledge only — may be outdated. Perplexity and models are configured in Settings.
aiEnrich.vercelAiCreditsUnavailable: Vercel AI Gateway credits could not be loaded.
aiEnrich.vercelAiCreditsNotConfigured: Set AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY to display gateway credits.
aiEnrich.grokBillingNotice: Grok usage is billed to your xAI account. Check your balance at
aiEnrich.addressFocusActive: Address focus is enabled in settings — research prioritizes location and water-proximity fields.
aiEnrich.costHintHigher: Structuring: higher cost (large model); web search still uses the default fast model.
aiEnrich.errorVercelCreditsActionHint: Add Vercel AI Gateway credits or top up in the dashboard.
aiEnrich.bulkListTitle: Public web research for all selected companies (nothing saved automatically)
aiEnrich.bulkDoneImport: Import: {ok} of {total} companies enriched by AI ({fail} failed).
aiEnrich.modelUsedResearchFootnoteFull: Web search (Perplexity) uses a fixed research model; JSON structuring follows your settings.
aiEnrich.modelUsedResearchFootnoteModelOnly: No web — structuring uses the model shown (fallback as in settings).

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.subtitle: People who live on the water
contacts.toastTrashedContact: This contact was moved to the trash.
contacts.notificationAssignedBody: You were set as the responsible person for this contact.
contacts.tableDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this contact?
contacts.tableDeleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this contact? This cannot be undone.
contacts.detailEmptyLinkedCompany: No contacts linked to this company.
contacts.unlinkConfirmDescription: The contact will not be deleted, only unlinked from the company.

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.subtitle: Carpe diem
reminders.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this reminder? This cannot be undone.
reminders.toastTrashedReminder: This reminder was moved to the trash.

openmap.appleBasemapNotice: Note: Apple Maps currently use the same OpenStreetMap/CARTO basemap as before.
openmap.cachedPoisHint: Using cached POIs — this area was already loaded.
openmap.googleNoApiKeyDescription: Add a key with Map Tiles API enabled under Settings.
openmap.googleSessionErrorNetwork: Check your network and try again.
openmap.googleSessionErrorHttp: HTTP error: check key, billing, and Map Tiles API in your Google project.
openmap.googleSessionErrorUnexpected: Unexpected response from Google — could not read session.
openmap.waterCalcNoCoords: No coordinates available for water calculation
openmap.waterCalcError: Water calculation failed. Please try again later.
openmap.importSuccessDescription: The company is now available in the list.
openmap.osmImportTimelineContent:
Imported from OpenStreetMap. Name, address, and coordinates were taken over.

OSM: {osmUrl}

brevo.pageDescription: Create email campaigns and send them to Brevo. Bulk contact sync is under
brevo.newCampaignDescription: Pick a template, review content, set the audience — then submit to Brevo.
brevo.campaignListDescription: Overview of recently synced campaigns from your Brevo account.
brevo.syncDescription: Select contacts, filter by customer type and status, import into Brevo lists — or use bulk sync for the full filtered set.
brevo.massSyncDescription: Send all CRM contacts that match the bulk-sync filters to Brevo in one step — without selecting rows in the table.
brevo.syncFormApiKeyHelp: The API key lives in BREVO_API_KEY in .env.local (restart the server after changes). Use a v3 API key from Brevo → SMTP & API → API keys (usually xkeysib-) — SMTP relay keys (xsmtpsib-) do not work with the REST API.
brevo.syncFormMassSyncHelp: Bulk sync only: These filters define which CRM contacts are created in Brevo. On Brevo (/brevo) you filter the recipient table separately for individual campaigns.
brevo.syncToastNoContactsDescription: No contact matches the filters (customer type/status) or you have no contacts in this account.
brevo.syncToastNothingDescription: All matching contacts were checked; none had an email to import.
brevo.syncResultSubmitted: {count} submitted to Brevo bulk import API
brevo.syncSelectAllPageAria: Select all rows on this page
brevo.syncContactsCardDescription: Search and filter by customer type and status. Selected rows are sent to Brevo when you import.
brevo.syncTableEmpty: No contacts match the current filters.
brevo.syncImportCardDescription: Choose target lists and optionally create a new list. Only selected CRM contacts with a valid email are imported.
brevo.syncListsHelp: Multiple selection — contacts are assigned to the lists you choose.
brevo.syncListsEmpty: No lists in this Brevo account
brevo.syncNewListHelp: Optional: in addition to or instead of existing lists. Brevo creates the list on import and assigns contacts.
brevo.syncNewListSwitchAria: Create new Brevo list on import
brevo.syncImportHintNone: Select at least one contact in the table.
brevo.syncImportHintNoTarget: Select at least one list or turn on “Create new list” with a name.
brevo.syncImportHintReady: Import runs asynchronously in Brevo; the confirmation shows the process ID.
brevo.syncResultDialogDescription: The Brevo API accepted the import. The split between newly created and existing contacts appears after the background job finishes — the submitted count is all valid emails from your selection.
brevo.syncStatMatchedHint: Contacts you had selected in the table.
brevo.syncStatSkippedHint: Without a usable email address — not sent to Brevo.
brevo.syncStatSubmittedHint: Contacts in Brevo’s import queue — includes new records and updates until the job completes.
brevo.syncStatExistingHint: How many contacts were only updated will be visible in Brevo after the import completes.
brevo.syncProcessIdHelp: For tracking in Brevo or support.
brevo.campaignFormTemplatesCardDescription: CRM templates from the AquaDock archive or official Brevo templates — the selection pre-fills subject and body.
brevo.campaignFormCrmTemplateHint: After selection the campaign name, subject and HTML are populated automatically.
brevo.campaignFormBrevoTemplateHint: Active SMTP templates from your Brevo account. When selected, the form picks up subject and HTML; Brevo uses the template ID on send.
brevo.campaignFormDetailsCardDescription: Name, subject and body of the email. When a template is applied the fields are highlighted and pre-filled.
brevo.campaignFormHtmlHint: Without a template: at least 20 characters (excluding surrounding whitespace). With a template, subject and content are taken from the selected template on save if the campaign uses it.
brevo.campaignFormScheduledHint: Leave blank for immediate send or manual release in Brevo.
brevo.campaignFormListsCardDescription: Contact lists from your Brevo account — optional if you also or exclusively select recipients from the CRM.
brevo.campaignFormListsHint: Optional if you select recipients from the “CRM contacts” section. Without CRM recipients, pick at least one list.
brevo.campaignFormCrmCardDescription: Select individual contacts in the table. At least one audience source (lists and/or CRM) is required.
brevo.campaignFormSubmitHint: The campaign is created in your Brevo account. You manage status and delivery there.
brevo.campaignFormToastSuccessDescription: The campaign was created in your Brevo account or scheduled for delivery. Status can be tracked in Brevo.
brevo.campaignListStatsDescription: Metrics from Brevo (globalStats). For older campaigns the API may only return events from recent months.
brevo.campaignListStatsFooter: More detailed analyses and campaign management directly in Brevo:
brevo.recipientIntro: Filters apply only to this recipient table (campaign). Bulk sync to Brevo:

massEmail.title: Mass email
massEmail.subtitle: Send professional campaigns
massEmail.toastSelectRecipients: Please select at least one recipient.
massEmail.toastFiltered: {count} invalid email addresses were removed automatically.
massEmail.progressDescription: Emails are being sent in the background. Please wait until the process finishes.
massEmail.templatesPageSubtitle: Manage reusable templates for mass email and quick mail
massEmail.templatesDeleteDescription: This cannot be undone. The template "{name}" will be permanently deleted.
massEmail.templateFormDescription: Create or edit an email template with placeholders for personalised messages.
massEmail.templateFormBodyPlaceholder:
Hello '{{vorname}}',

we are pleased to welcome you at '{{firmenname}}'.

Placeholders: '{{vorname}}', '{{nachname}}', '{{firmenname}}', '{{anrede}}', '{{name}}', '{{stadt}}'
massEmail.templatePreviewDescription: Preview of the email template with placeholders.
massEmail.recipientSearchPlaceholder: Search by name, email or company…
massEmail.recipientEmptyHint: Try a different search or switch the mode.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.subtitle: Activities & history
timeline.createDialogDescription: Log calls, emails, meetings, or notes—optionally link a company and contact.
timeline.searchPlaceholder: Search title, description, company, or contact…
timeline.deleteConfirmDescription: Delete this entry? This cannot be undone.
timeline.toastDeleteAlreadyTrashedDescription: This entry has already been discarded (it is in the trash) and cannot be deleted again. To have it removed permanently, please contact an administrator, who can purge it from the admin trash bin in profile settings.
timeline.toastTrashedTimeline: This timeline entry was moved to the trash.
timeline.detailEmptyCompany: No timeline entries for this company.

comments.cardSubtitle: Visible to your team. Keep call summaries, next steps, and deal context together.
comments.placeholder: Quick note, call summary, next step…
comments.attachmentsPendingLabel: Files to attach with your next note
comments.attachmentTooLargeToast: One or more files are too large (max 15 MB per file).
comments.editAttachmentsEmpty: No files on this note yet.
comments.attachmentsLibrarySubtitle: Attachments from internal notes on this company.
comments.attachmentsLibraryEmpty: No files attached to notes yet.
comments.deleteConfirmDescription: This note will be hidden from the feed (soft-deleted).
comments.emptyPrompt: Add your first internal note about this company — a call summary, next step, or deal context your team should see.
comments.chipCallSummaryTemplate:
## Call summary
- Date: 
- Contact: 
- Topic: 
- Outcome: 
- Next step:
comments.chipDecisionMakerTemplate:
## Decision maker
- Name: 
- Role: 
- Influence: 
- Next contact:

feedback.title: Give Feedback
feedback.thankYouToast: Thank you! Your feedback has been sent.
feedback.inboxDescription: All user-submitted feedback with optional screenshots.
feedback.inboxDeleteConfirmDescription: This permanently removes the feedback and its screenshot from storage (if any). This cannot be undone.

inAppNotifications.pageDescription: Activity and assignments for your account.

layout.commandPaletteDescription: Open a page or create a company, contact, reminder, or activity.
layout.commandPaletteFooterHint: Arrow keys to move · Enter to open · Esc to close
layout.commandPaletteSearchButtonTooltip: Quick navigation: open a page or create a company, contact, reminder, or activity. Shortcut: Ctrl+K or ⌘K.
layout.globalSearchDescription: This isn't built yet — we'll add a proper global search here when it's ready. Until then, jump in via the sidebar or the list pages.
layout.commandPaletteTriggerAria: Open command menu (jump to a page or quick action)
layout.reminderThisWeekLinkAria: View open reminders due this week

profile.trashBinDisabled: Trash bin is disabled in Settings. No discarded items are shown.
profile.trashConfirmHard: Permanently delete selected items? This cannot be undone.
profile.avatarPreviewDescription: This is how your profile picture will look. Confirm the upload or cancel.

csvImport.dialogDescription: Upload a CSV with company data. Expected columns include company name, customer type, and address.
csvImport.dropHint: Drag and drop a file or click to select
csvImport.guideDialogDescription: Supported column headers and examples for company CSV import.
csvImport.parseErrorNoRows: No valid rows found (company name and customer type are required).
csvImport.previewVorschauAiPointer: To research and fill gaps with AI, open the AI enrichment tab. After you apply suggestions, the updated data shows here.
csvImport.previewAiEnrichTabIntro: Select rows in the table, then run enrichment (max. {max} rows per batch). Review suggestions in the dialog — only empty cells are filled.
csvImport.coordGeocodeNoRows: No rows with enough address and missing coordinates
csvImport.coordGeocodeToastNoRowsDescription: Add street or postal code and city for at least one row.
csvImport.coordGeocodeToastTruncated: Only the first {max} rows are geocoded in this batch.
csvImport.coordGeocodeToastDoneDescription: {hits} matches, {misses} no match — review in the dialog.
csvImport.coordProblemsEmpty: No coordinate issues in this import.
csvImport.coordProblemsNotice: {count} row(s) with incomplete or missing coordinates.
csvImport.duplicateTabEmpty: No potential duplicates found for this file.
csvImport.previewFooterDuplicateFailed: Duplicate check failed — see the Duplicates tab.
csvImport.previewImportIncludeAllAria: Include all importable rows in this import
csvImport.previewImportRowDisabledHint: Not importable until you allow import in the Duplicates tab
csvImport.previewImportIncludeHint: Uncheck Import to skip a row that would otherwise be imported. Duplicate handling stays in the Duplicates tab.
csvImport.previewFooterImportSummary: {importable} of {total} records will be imported. Please review the preview before continuing.
csvImport.previewFooterDupBlurb: {count} row(s) skipped as likely duplicates — open the Duplicates tab to allow import.
csvImport.previewFooterUserExBlurb: {count} row(s) excluded in the Import column.
csvImport.previewFooterImportNone: No rows are set to import. Turn Import back on for eligible rows or allow duplicates where needed.
csvImport.previewFooterImportAllForced: All {count} records will be imported, including {flagged} flagged as possible duplicates (import allowed per row).
csvImport.previewAiEnrichHint: Select rows with the checkboxes, then use the button below (max. {max} rows per run). Only empty cells are filled; confirm in the review dialog.
csvImport.aiEnrichSelectRowsFirst: Select at least one row in the table.
csvImport.aiEnrichBatchTruncated: Only the first {max} rows are included in this batch (daily limits apply).
csvImport.aiEnrichReviewDescription: Select rows to merge into the import data. Empty fields only. Continue to import when ready.
csvImport.formatAlertDescription: Delimiter: semicolon (;). First row contains headers. Case-insensitive; surrounding spaces are trimmed. Only rows with company name and customer type are imported.
csvImport.sectionParserDescription: These columns are read and used in the preview and import.
csvImport.sectionFutureDescription: You may see these columns in exports or prepare them — the current company CSV import ignores them.
csvImport.duplicateModalDescription: Flagged rows are skipped by default. Check “Import anyway” only if you intend to create another record.
csvImport.duplicateAlertBody: Matches use OSM ID, website domain, or name and address. Similar names are not fuzzy-matched; confirm each row manually.
csvImport.toastImportSkippedOnly: No rows imported. {skipped} duplicate row(s) skipped.
csvImport.toastImportSuccessWithSkipped: {imported} companies imported · {coords} with coordinates · {skipped} duplicate row(s) skipped

firmenname.label: Company name
firmenname.notes: Required. At least one name per row.

kundentyp.label: Customer type / category
kundentyp.notes: Required. Lowercase, e.g. restaurant, hotel, resort, camping, marina, sailing_school, sailing_club, boat_rental, new_customer, existing_customer, prospect, partner, other.

strasse.label: Street / address
strasse.notes: Address line without postal code or city.

ort.label: City
ort.notes: Stored as city in the database on import.

land.label: Country
land.notes: Prefer ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 (e.g. DE, HR). Supported names are normalised to codes on import.

firmentyp.label: Company type
firmentyp.notes: Not imported yet. CRM allows: kette, einzeln.

ap1_vorname.label: Contact 1 – first name
ap1_vorname.notes: Contact columns are ignored in company CSV import; add contacts separately.

login.heroTitle: Own Every European Waterfront Opportunity — One View
login.heroDescription: The internal command center for AquaDock's sales, partnerships, and growth — from first lead to long-term operator success.
login.benefit1: Full pipeline visibility across every market
login.benefit3: OpenMap lead discovery and deal tracking
login.trustStatement: The internal CRM powering AquaDock's expansion across Europe
login.mobileTagline: AquaDock's internal sales and partner CRM
login.signInDescription: Enter your credentials to access AquaDock CRM
login.recoveryLinkExpiredDescription: Please request a new reset link and open it from the email again.
login.recoverySetDescription: Choose a secure password that you don't use anywhere else.
login.recoveryPersistentError: If the problem persists, check that the link was opened completely and try again with a new link.
login.recoverySuccess: Password changed successfully. You are being redirected to sign in...
login.recoveryTimeoutToastDescription: Please request a new reset link and open it again.
login.supabaseClientInitHint: Supabase URL or anon key is missing in this build. For local runs, use pnpm dev or rebuild with NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY set (e.g. in .env.local) before pnpm build when using next start.

onboarding.applyDescription: Submit your work email. You will confirm it via link before an admin reviews your request.
onboarding.successDescription: We sent a confirmation link. After you confirm, an admin will review your access request.
onboarding.accessPendingDescription: Your email is confirmed. An administrator will review your request shortly.
onboarding.accessDeniedDescription: Your access request was not approved. You can still sign out and contact your administrator if you need help.
